title: ilex longipes
intro: Ilex longipes, also known as the "Mountain Holly," is a species of holly native to the mountains of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ilex longipes include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Ilex longipes can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to make a tea that is used to treat a range of health ailments.
